mapper.select: SELECT wt.id AS id, wt.wallet_id AS walletId, w.user_id AS walletUserId, wt.work_case_id AS workCaseId, wt.transaction_type AS transactionType, wt.amount AS amount, wt.available_before AS availableBefore, wt.available_after AS availableAfter, wt.locked_before AS lockedBefore, wt.locked_after AS lockedAfter, wt.reference_type AS referenceType, wt.reference_id AS referenceId FROM wallet_transactions wt JOIN wallets w ON w.id = wt.wallet_id WHERE wt.idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} FOR SHARE OF wt
